title: Harris Seriously Good Continental Filling Knives 4 Pack 102064328
features: Flexible stainless steel blades for filling small and detailed areas with ease
Variety pack containing 4 different sizes for repairing small areas of damage
Suitable for use with general purpose filler, fine surface filler, and wood filler
Easy to clean with warm soapy water, ensuring complete dryness before storing
Perfect for staining or varnishing smaller woodwork areas, providing a smooth finish
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Seriously Good Continental Filling Knives 4 Pack Contents 1 x 2in (50mm) 1 x 3in (75mm) 1 x 4in (100mm) 1 x 5in (125mm) For Staining or Varnishing those Smaller woodwork areas This Seriously Good Continental Filling Knives pack contains all the filling knives you need for different size filling jobs. The flexible stainless steel blades make it easy to fill different size holes and cracks For use with general purpose filler, fine surface filler and wood filler. Remove all filler from knives after use, wipe clean with a damp cloth then dry with a clean cloth Preparing a Project Team these filling knives up with Harris Seriously Good Sandpaper, Harris Seriously Good Masking Tape and Harris Seriously Good Cotton Rich Dust Sheet. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
